name: TechnipFMC plc
summary: PART I Company Overview TechnipFMC plc (TechnipFMC, the Company, we, or our) is a leading technology provider to the traditional and new energy industries, delivering fully integrated projects, products, and services. With our proprietary technologies and comprehensive solutions, we transform our clients project economics, unlocking new possibilities to develop energy resources while reducing carbon intensity and supporting their energy transition ambitions.
